---
title: "TAD Interactive DRAFT"
author: "Nicky Spiva"
date: "5/22/2026"
format: html
---

Doing the Shiny tutorial.

```{r setup}
install.packages("shiny")
install.packages("tidyverse")
```

```{r}
install.packages(c("ggiraph", "sf"))
install.packages("ggspatial")
```

```{r}
install.packages(c("prettymapr", "rosm"))
```

```{r}
install.packages("raster")
```

```{r}
library(shiny)

#runExample("shiny-dir/app.R")
runApp("posts/shiny-practice/my_app", display.mode = "showcase")
```

```{r}
runExample("06_tabsets", display.mode = "showcase")
```

```{r}
runApp("posts/shiny-practice/model_app")
```

testing basic graph

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# fmt:skip
data <- tibble::tibble(
  ShortName = c(2007L, 2008L, 2009L, 2010L, 2011L, 2012L, 2013L, 2014L, 2015L, 2016L, 2017L, 2018L, 2019L, 2020L, 2021L, 2022L, 2023L, 2024L),
  Beltline = c("$856,293,808", "$959,934,864", "$988,288,000", "$971,967,504", "$1,001,403,856", "$978,910,761", "$926,844,140", "$1,004,089,798", "$1,004,089,798", "$1,223,050,986", "$1,289,298,445", "$1,379,414,256", "$1,732,186,435", "$1,950,379,635", "$2,214,125,917", "$2,578,328,762", "$2,929,326,477", "$3,326,306,262"),
  Westside = c("$585,299,825", "$699,702,894", "$715,486,728", "$715,486,728", "$684,564,030", "$641,143,620", "$589,213,310", "$564,992,488", "$565,490,934", "$658,274,979", "$652,185,759", "$680,929,923", "$822,529,690", "$961,881,130", "$969,201,919", "$1,014,591,892", "$1,115,276,251", "$1,263,833,989"),
  PerryBolton = c("$165,248,471", "$179,063,126", "$165,551,173", "$151,735,705", "$151,735,705", "$129,099,238", "$117,287,350", "$116,143,975", "$114,229,141", "$128,831,939", "$132,114,800", "$139,347,293", "$181,089,730", "$209,924,527", "$256,364,795", "$310,871,864", "$394,898,775", "#N/A"),
  Eastside = c("$486,369,642", "$604,022,294", "$600,002,679", "$572,619,364", "$558,153,508", "$501,719,348", "$501,719,348", "$504,177,170", "$543,372,120", "$610,733,139", "$606,605,664", "$656,482,549", "$827,285,660", "$925,764,765", "$931,407,863", "$1,033,952,636", "$1,053,329,303", "$1,214,454,912"),
  Campbellton = c("#N/A", "$139,473,672", "$166,805,732", "$155,891,270", "$142,887,096", "$128,733,206", "$115,023,392", "$114,730,835", "$119,334,690", "$203,157,467", "$141,221,488", "$157,640,490", "$176,623,937", "$177,925,369", "$197,263,218", "$210,041,021", "$300,447,451", "$368,769,441"),
  Metropolitan = c("#N/A", "$63,721,064", "$64,478,089", "$57,186,344", "$65,838,480", "$50,134,692", "$48,448,460", "$52,883,650", "$50,009,820", "$47,294,490", "$49,327,900", "$58,311,970", "$65,128,134", "$56,327,173", "$63,104,273", "$67,169,415", "$79,614,798", "$90,949,289"),
  Stadium = c("#N/A", "$35,889,442", "$31,894,690", "$28,672,653", "$25,156,180", "$20,904,710", "$19,671,320", "$21,213,640", "$33,724,110", "$22,627,070", "$24,192,250", "$32,137,600", "$36,542,240", "$37,906,953", "$77,488,658", "$104,492,925", "$173,073,192", "$173,073,192"),
  AtlantaicStation = c("$376,020,220", "$441,430,380", "$500,761,450", "$455,267,350", "$420,485,420", "$440,516,300", "$371,751,400", "$412,774,470", "$525,245,040", "$518,680,970", "$516,929,823", "$636,170,780", "$636,170,780", "$621,757,635", "$625,953,204", "$680,446,548", "$689,930,234", "$749,940,124"),
  PrincetonLake = c("$86,129,610", "$103,885,872", "$99,070,638", "$102,097,084", "$91,846,240", "$86,436,170", "$87,984,238", "$66,662,831", "$70,291,735", "$70,291,735", "$101,011,578", "$101,532,203", "$117,898,120", "$122,695,270", "$129,688,331", "$138,647,682", "$141,187,157", "#N/A"),
  Hollowell = c("#N/A", "$66,626,646", "$68,315,623", "$63,679,330", "$64,372,730", "$57,299,284", "$53,056,804", "$51,695,602", "$53,938,390", "$52,206,090", "$51,303,540", "$57,342,510", "$63,517,510", "$67,309,770", "$77,342,890", "$80,931,840", "$107,944,261", "$108,714,748"),
  # COA = c("$1,351,865,769", "$1,384,334,639", "$1,365,825,364", "$1,312,282,013", "$1,190,668,238", "$1,168,673,801", "$1,205,319,161", "$1,066,507,914", "$1,201,797,931", "$1,391,543,131", "$1,606,184,152", "$1,970,109,230", "$1,927,332,525", "$2,037,148,934", "$2,163,993,691", "$2,497,211,868", "$2,614,391,638", "$2,788,845,569"),
  # x = c("$2,555,361,576", "$3,293,750,254", "$3,400,654,802", "$3,274,603,332", "$3,206,443,245", "$3,034,897,329", "$2,830,999,762", "$2,909,364,459", "$3,079,725,778", "$3,535,148,865", "$3,564,191,247", "$3,899,309,574", "$4,658,972,236", "$5,131,872,227", "$5,541,941,068", "$6,219,474,585", "$6,985,027,899", "$7,296,041,957")
)

long_data_clean <- data %>%
  rename(year = ShortName) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -year,
    names_to = "TAD Name",
    values_to = "Property Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Convert literal "#N/A" strings to true R NA values
    `Property_Value` = na_if(`Property Value`, "#N/A"),
    # Strip the '$' and ',' and convert to numeric
    `Property_Value` = parse_number(`Property Value`)
  )

# Now your Property Value column is ready for math/ggplot!
head(long_data_clean)

#ggplot(data) +
# geom_line(aes(x,y))
long_data_clean

usd <- scales::label_currency(
  prefix = "$",
  scale_cut = c(0, k = 1e3, m = 1e6, bn = 1e9, tn = 1e12)
)

ggplot(
  data = long_data_clean,
  mapping = aes(x = year, y = Property_Value, color = `TAD Name`)
) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = usd,
    breaks = seq(from = 0, 4000000000, by = 500000000)
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "TAD Property Values from 2003-2023") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank())
```

Ok I've got the basic TAD property value chart going. Now to add a map of the TADs.
